name: SearchPKS
description: Searches the SBSPKS v2 + MIBiG combined database for polyketides, NRPSs, and PKS-NRPS hybrids structurally similar to a query molecule. Returns ranked hits with Tanimoto similarity scores, biosynthetic pathway context, organism, and—for intermediate matches—auto-generated engineering hints for early chain release or module substitution.

inputs.name: query_smiles
inputs.description: SMILES string of the target molecule. Must be parseable by RDKit. Example: "CCC1OC(=O)C(C)C(=O)C(C)C(OC2OC(C)CC(C2O)N(C)C)C(C)CC(C)C(=O)C=CC1(C)O" for pikromycin.

inputs.name: search_type
inputs.description: Search mode. "reaction_search" ranks all 4000+ index entries by Tanimoto similarity and returns hits with full metadata. "pathway_search" does the same but additionally fetches the complete biosynthetic step list from SBSPKS for each hit.

inputs.name: max_results
inputs.description: Maximum number of similar compounds to return (default 5).

inputs.name: similarity_threshold
inputs.description: Minimum Tanimoto similarity cutoff between 0.0 and 1.0 (default 0.6). Entries below this value are excluded.

outputs.description: Dict with keys: query_smiles (str), total_hits (int), results (list of hit dicts), search_type_used (str), warnings (list of str). Each hit dict contains: compound_name, smiles, similarity_score, source (sbspks or mibig), is_intermediate, module_number, pathway_name, organism, bgc_accession, engineering_hint. pathway_search hits also include pathway_steps (list of str).

trigger_phrases: what natural products are similar to
